tasks.subject: Strengthen e2e test assertions
tasks.description:
Fix all 13 e2e tests in src/e2e_tests.rs to verify actual behavior, not just presence:
- Deletion tests must assert deleted text is ABSENT (e.g., `!output.contains("world")` after Ctrl+W)
- `e2e_esc_quits` must verify process termination via `is_alive()`
- `e2e_slash_shows_commands` must verify command list content, not just non-empty
- `e2e_shift_enter` must verify text is on separate lines
- `e2e_ctrl_a` must verify prepend order, not just X exists
- `e2e_ctrl_y` must verify yank restored text (no OR fallback)
- `e2e_tui_starts` should have a single specific assertion
- `e2e_type_text_and_delete` must verify text is gone after Ctrl+U

tasks.subject: Replace Box<dyn Error> with thiserror enum
tasks.description:
Replace `Box<dyn std::error::Error>` in app.rs with a proper `thiserror` error enum.
Three methods affected: `App::new()` (line ~175), `App::run()` (line ~297), `App::build_llm_client()` (line ~317).
Also check main.rs for `Box<dyn std::error::Error>` in `main()` return type.
Create a `TuiError` enum with concrete variants for each error source (IO, config, LLM, etc.).
tasks.activeForm: Replacing Box<dyn Error> with thiserror enum

tasks.subject: Implement yank_pop() properly or remove binding
tasks.description:
Fix `yank_pop()` in app.rs (line ~560). Currently rotates the kill ring but doesn't re-yank the new entry.
Options:
A) Implement properly: track the last yanked text, remove it, then yank the new entry after rotation.
B) Remove the Alt+Y binding if proper implementation is too complex.
Recommendation: Implement A — track `last_yank: Option<String>` on App, on yank_pop: remove last_yank from input, rotate ring, yank new entry.

tasks.subject: Fix word movement for multi-byte UTF-8
tasks.description:
Fix `move_word_backward` and `move_word_forward` in app.rs (lines ~478-520) to scan chars instead of bytes.
Currently uses `as_bytes()` for whitespace detection which breaks on multi-byte UTF-8.
Change to `.chars()` iteration with proper char index tracking.
tasks.activeForm: Fixing word movement for multi-byte UTF-8

tasks.subject: Guard open_model_picker() against None agent
tasks.description:
Fix `open_model_picker()` in app.rs (line ~630) to guard against `self.agent()` being None.
Currently calls `self.agent().state()` which unwraps an Option.
Add `if let Some(agent) = &self.agent` guard or use `if let` pattern.

tasks.subject: Verify all fixes with tests + clippy + fmt
tasks.description:
After all fixes:
1. Run `cargo fmt --all`
2. Run `cargo clippy -p pi-host-tui`
3. Run `cargo test -p pi-host-tui` — all 198+ tests must pass
4. Verify no new warnings
tasks.activeForm: Verifying all fixes with tests + clippy + fmt
